messages.text: Righteous crusading zeal fills you, and your strikes sharpen to a keen, unerring edge.
{name} is wreathed in righteous crusading zeal.
The crusading zeal fades and the keen edge leaves your strikes.
The crusading zeal wreathing {name} fades away.
{name} is wreathed in righteous crusading zeal, their strikes keen and unerring.
